code: sim_data <- simulate_validatedData(   n_datasets = 10,    design_type = "BySpecies",   scenarios = list(     spp1 = 0.15,      spp2 = 0.15,      spp3 = c(0.15, .5, 1),     spp4 = 0.1,      spp5 = c(0.5, 1),     spp6 = 0.25   ),   nsites = nsites,    nspecies = nspecies,    nvisits = nvisits,   psi = psi,    lambda = lambda,    theta = Theta,    directory = tempdir() ) names(sim_data) ## [1] "full_datasets" "zeros"         "masked_dfs"    "scenarios_df" sim_data$scenarios_df ##   scenario spp1 spp2 spp3 spp4 spp5 spp6 ## 1        1 0.15 0.15 0.15  0.1  0.5 0.25 ## 2        2 0.15 0.15 0.50  0.1  0.5 0.25 ## 3        3 0.15 0.15 1.00  0.1  0.5 0.25 ## 4        4 0.15 0.15 0.15  0.1  1.0 0.25 ## 5        5 0.15 0.15 0.50  0.1  1.0 0.25 ## 6        6 0.15 0.15 1.00  0.1  1.0 0.25 # Define the scenarios dataframe. Each row is a scenario, each column is a spp my_scenarios <- data.frame(   spp1 = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.1),    spp2 = c(0.1, 0.2, 0.3),   spp3 = c(0.2, 0.2, 0.25),    spp4 = c(0.4, 0.5, 0.6),    spp5 = rep(1, 3),    spp6 = rep(0.5, 3) )  sim_data2 <- simulate_validatedData(   n_datasets = 10,    design_type = "BySpecies",   scen_expand = FALSE,    scen_df = my_scenarios,   scenarios = NULL,   nsites = nsites,    nspecies = nspecies,    nvisits = nvisits,   psi = psi,    lambda = lambda,    theta = Theta,    directory = tempdir() )  sim_data2$scenarios_df # the same as my_scenarios above ##   scenario spp1 spp2 spp3 spp4 spp5 spp6 ## 1        1 0.05  0.1 0.20  0.4    1  0.5 ## 2        2 0.05  0.2 0.20  0.5    1  0.5 ## 3        3 0.10  0.3 0.25  0.6    1  0.5 summary1 <- sim_data$scenarios_df summary2 <- summarize_n_validated(   sim_data$masked_dfs,    scenario_numbers = 1:6,   theta_scenario = "BySpecies" )  call_sum <- left_join(summary1, summary2, by = "scenario")  call_sum ##   scenario spp1 spp2 spp3 spp4 spp5 spp6 theta_scenario n_selected ## 1        1 0.15 0.15 0.15  0.1  0.5 0.25      BySpecies      603.8 ## 2        2 0.15 0.15 0.50  0.1  0.5 0.25      BySpecies     1018.3 ## 3        3 0.15 0.15 1.00  0.1  0.5 0.25      BySpecies     1610.4 ## 4        4 0.15 0.15 0.15  0.1  1.0 0.25      BySpecies      778.3 ## 5        5 0.15 0.15 0.50  0.1  1.0 0.25      BySpecies     1192.8 ## 6        6 0.15 0.15 1.00  0.1  1.0 0.25      BySpecies     1784.9 ##   n_validated ## 1       603.8 ## 2      1018.3 ## 3      1610.4 ## 4       778.3 ## 5      1192.8 ## 6      1784.9

title: run_sims: conduct simulations easily — run_sims
text: data_list nested list masked dataframes (datasets nested within scenarios – format masked_dfs output simulate_validatedData) zeros_list list dataframes containing site/visit/true_spp/id_spp combinations calls observed. DGVs named list entries psi, lambda theta containing true values respective parameters. theta_scenario_id character string ID simulations run. parallel models fit parallel? Default value TRUE. niter Number iterations per MCMC chain. nburn Number warmup iterations. thin Thinning interval MCMC chains. nchains number chains. save_fits individual model fits saved? require large amounts disk space fitting many large models big datasets. Default value FALSE. save_individual_summaries_list summaries individual model fits saved? requires much less space save_fits, still recommend keeping default value FALSE. use anticipate simulations may interrupted. directory directory save objects. Defaults tempdir(), users specify permanent location real simulation studies tempdir() cleared end R session.

title: run_sims: conduct simulations easily — run_sims
code: # :::::::::::: Simulate data ::::::::::::: # psi <- c(0.3, 0.6) lambda <- c(11, 2)  nspecies <- length(psi) nsites <- 30 nvisits <- 5  test_theta1 <- matrix(c(0.9, 0.1, 0.15, 0.85), byrow = TRUE, nrow = 2) val_scenarios <- list(spp1 = c(.75, .5), spp2 = .5)  td <- withr::local_tempdir()  fake_data <- simulate_validatedData(   n_datasets = 5,   design_type = "BySpecies",   scenarios = val_scenarios,   nsites = nsites,   nvisits = nvisits,   nspecies = nspecies,   psi = psi,   lambda = lambda,   theta = test_theta1,   save_datasets = FALSE,   save_masked_datasets = FALSE,   directory = td )  # ::::::::::::: run simulations on sim'd data ::::::::::: #  if (interactive()){  out <- run_sims(   data_list = fake_data$masked_dfs,   zeros_list = fake_data$zeros,   DGVs = list(lambda = lambda, psi = psi, theta = test_theta1),   theta_scenario_id = 'StratBySpecies_1',   parallel = FALSE,   nchains = 2,   niter = 500,   nburn = 250,   thin = 1,   save_fits = FALSE,   save_individual_summaries_list = FALSE,   directory = td ) }

Default draw random vector U(.4, .9) distribution. lambda vector length nspecies contains relative activity parameters species. Note values need positive. default, lambda values absolute value normal(0, 100) random variables. theta n nspecies x nspecies matrix containing (mis)classification probabilities species. entries must (0,1], rows matrix summing 1. default draws rows dirichlet distribution concentrations determined location matrix (diagonal values higher concentrations).

title: Simulate many datasets under candidate validation designs — simulate_validatedData
code: simulate_validatedData(   n_datasets,   design_type = c("BySpecies", "FixedPercent"),   scenarios = NULL,   nsites = 100,   nspecies = 8,   nvisits = 3,   psi = runif(nspecies, 0.1, 0.9),   lambda = abs(rnorm(nspecies, 0, 5)),   theta = t(apply(diag(18, nrow = nspecies) + 2, 1, function(x) {          nimble::rdirch(alpha = x)  })),   confirmable_limits = NULL,   scen_expand = TRUE,   scen_df = NULL,   save_datasets = FALSE,   save_masked_datasets = FALSE,   directory = tempdir() )

title: Simulate many datasets under candidate validation designs — simulate_validatedData
text: n_datasets number datasets like simulated. simulated datasets subjected candidate validation designs. design_type Character string, either "BySpecies" stratified--species design, "FixedPercentage" fixed effort design (see Oram et al., review details ) scenarios design_type = "BySpecies", scenarios argument must list entry corresponding potential levels effort particular autoID label. design_type == "FixedPercent", scenarios argument must vector entry corresponding potential percent calls sampled first visit site. See vignette example. nsites number sites dataset nspecies size species assemblage nvisits number visits site. Note simulations assume balanced design. psi vector length nspecies assumed occurrence probabilities species lambda vector length nspecies assumed relative activity levels species. Make sure order correct matches psi. theta matrix containing (mis)classification probabilities. rows matrix must sum 1. See vignette example. confirmable_limits numeric vector containing lower upper bounds site-visit probabilities recording can validated ("confirmed"). scen_expand design_type = "BySpecies", simulate_validatedData expand list scenarios? TRUE (default value), scenarios must list; FALSE, simulate_validatedData expects user-supplied dataframe object scen_df argument. scen_df scen_expand = FALSE, user-supplied dataframe object row corresponding validation scenario column species. Default value NULL. save_datasets logical. TRUE, datasets without masking true species labels (.e., corresponding complete validation recordings) saved. Default value FALSE. save_masked_datasets logical. TRUE, masked datasets (.e., simulated datasets partial validation according simulation scenario) saved. means n_datasets x nrow(scenarios_dataframe) datasets saved: one dataset validation scenario. Default value FALSE. directory character. Required save_datasets = TRUE save_masked_datasets = TRUE. datasets saved. default, temporary directory used. must changed access saved datasets desired end R session, tempdir() cleared end session.

title: Simulate many datasets under candidate validation designs — simulate_validatedData
text: list containing three elements: full_datasets: list length n_datasets unmasked datasets (.e., full validation recordings). save_datasets = TRUE, saved individually directory dataset_n.rds, n dataset number. zeros: list length n_datasets containing site-visits recordings certain classification observed. example, , dataset 10, calls species 1 classified  3 visit 4 site 156, 10th entry list contain dataset row corresponding tosite = 156, visit = 4, true_spp = 1, id_spp = 3, count = 0. zeros necessary housekeeping model-fitting process. save_datasets = TRUE, zeros dataset saved directory individually zeros_in_dataset_n.rds, n dataset number. masked_dfs: nested list containing dataset masked scenario. masked_dfs\[\[9\]\]\[\[27\]\] contains dataset 27, assuming validation scenario 9. save_masked_datasets = TRUE, dataset/scenario scenario combination saved individually directory dataset_n_masked_under_scenario_s.rds, n dataset number s scenario number.

title: Get suggested MCMC settings prior to starting your simulations — tune_mcmc
code: psi <- c(0.3, 0.6) lambda <- c(11, 2)  nspecies <- length(psi) nsites <- 30 nvisits <- 5  test_theta1 <- matrix(c(0.9, 0.1, 0.15, 0.85), byrow = TRUE, nrow = 2) val_scenarios <- list(spp1 = c(.75, .5), spp2 = .5)  fake_data <- simulate_validatedData(   n_datasets = 5,   design_type = "BySpecies",   scenarios = val_scenarios,   nsites = nsites,   nvisits = nvisits,   nspecies = nspecies,   psi = psi,   lambda = lambda,   theta = test_theta1,   save_datasets = FALSE,   save_masked_datasets = FALSE,   directory = withr::local_tempdir() ) # scenario 1 has the lowest effort, so use the 5th dataset from that scenario # Not run during checks if (interactive()) { # note the index of the zeros matches the index of the dataset tune_mcmc(dataset = fake_data$masked_dfs[[1]][[5]], zeros = fake_data$zeros[[5]]) }
